flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Biola University rose 23% between 2007 and 2010 ($11.8k → $14.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Biola University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.4k → $49.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Biola University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.4k → $49.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Biola University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).
